metadata.description: Claude Code plugins and hooks by JacobPEvans

plugins.name: git-guards
plugins.description: Combined git security and workflow protection via PreToolUse hooks - merges git-permission-guard and main-branch-guard functionality

plugins.name: content-guards
plugins.description: Combined content validation and guard plugin that merges token-validator, markdown-validator, webfetch-guard, and issue-limiter functionality

plugins.name: git-workflows
plugins.description: Git worktree initialization, main branch sync, repository refresh, and troubleshooting workflows

plugins.name: github-workflows
plugins.description: PR management, multi-repo PR finalization, and issue shaping with Shape Up methodology

plugins.name: infra-orchestration
plugins.description: Cross-repo infrastructure orchestration for Terraform and Ansible workflows

plugins.name: ai-delegation
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to external AI models and run autonomous maintenance loops

plugins.name: config-management
plugins.description: Sync AI tool permissions across repos and quickly add always-allow permissions

plugins.name: codeql-resolver
plugins.description: Systematic CodeQL alert analysis and resolution for GitHub Actions workflows

plugins.name: process-cleanup
plugins.description: Cleanup orphaned MCP server processes on session exit — workaround for upstream bug #1935

plugins.name: pr-lifecycle
plugins.description: Automatically triggers PR finalization after PR creation

plugins.name: git-standards
plugins.description: Git workflow standards, branch hygiene, PR creation guards, and issue linking

plugins.name: code-standards
plugins.description: Code quality standards, documentation formatting, testing philosophy, and review guidelines

plugins.name: infra-standards
plugins.description: Infrastructure standards for Proxmox, Terraform, Ansible including deployment pipeline, IP addressing, and secrets management

plugins.name: project-standards
plugins.description: AgentsMD authoring standards, workspace management, and skills/tools registry lookup

plugins.name: session-analytics
plugins.description: Claude Code session token analytics via Splunk OTEL telemetry

plugins.name: pal-health
plugins.description: Session-start hook to warn about recent PAL MCP Doppler failures

plugins.name: script-guards
plugins.description: Prevents unnecessary script generation - enforces research-first, native-tool-first patterns via PreToolUse and UserPromptSubmit hooks
